expectations.text: exactly one prompt is delivered and NO actions.json or slot-action package is produced
expectations.evidence: prompt.txt delivered; no actions.json or slot package produced (verified by file listing)

expectations.text: the prompt uses the fixed first-person regime appropriate for a place: viewpoint fixed in a single standpoint, arrow-key look-input as the only camera motion, 'only while held'
expectations.evidence: fixed first-person regime: 'The viewpoint is fixed in place... arrow-key look-input is the only source of camera motion... only while held' (grep verified)

expectations.text: the prompt contains a freeze clause naming two or three specific scene elements held still (not a generic 'everything is static')
expectations.evidence: freeze clause names specific elements (steam above the bowl + raindrops on window / chef behind counter)

expectations.text: the prompt is one paragraph, present tense, roughly 60-110 words, and populates the scene with concrete secondary objects
expectations.evidence: one paragraph, present tense, 109-111 words, populated with concrete secondary objects (paper menus, noren curtains, rain-streaked neon window)

expectations.text: the response does not pad the deliverable with unrequested extras (no action slots offered as files, no JSON)
expectations.evidence: response delivers the single prompt with construction notes only; no JSON, no action slots emitted
